title: NOAA Tides and Water Levels
description: A NOAA source card about tides, water-level observations, coasts, and sea-level context.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA tide resources explain gravitational forces, tide cycles, coastal water-level observations, and why tides matter for navigation and shoreline communities.
Use this source for reading graphs, making predictions, and connecting astronomy concepts with coastal data.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
